title: Elbaf’s Crisis Converges
description: On pages 11–13, this part follows Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Giants, Unknown person #12, Dorry, Brogy as Elbaf’s present-day danger converges on the Straw Hats, Loki, and the giants as the island’s history and World Government pressure collide.
scene: Elbaf’s present-day danger converges on the Straw Hats, Loki, and the giants as the island’s history and World Government pressure collide.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "With their regeneration, we could keep cutting them down over and over for eternity!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And every one of 'em is a familiar face!!! Just seeing them GT hurt pains us, too.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: What the hell can we do...

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: DORRY... are you still in there?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How could we ever allow such mindless insults against an esteemed Elder Like Jarul to Cross Our Lips?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: right... it never should have come to this.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Taking his head would stain our honor for generations!!

summary: This part advances Elbaf’s Crisis Reaches the Straw Hats through 27 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
